title: Crispy Onigiri with Jamaican Jerk Filling and Cheonggukjang Dipping Sauce
description: A unique fusion dish that combines the crispy onigiri with the bold flavors of Jamaican jerk seasoning and the savory taste of cheonggukjang.
instructions: 1. Prepare the onigiri by cutting them into bite-sized pieces.
2. In a pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
3. Add the Jamaican jerk seasoning and stir for 1 minute.
4. Add the cheonggukjang and stir for 2 minutes.
5. Add the soy sauce and stir for 1 minute.
6. Arrange the onigiri pieces on a plate.
7. Spoon the cheonggukjang mixture over the onigiri.
8. Garnish with festive lettuce leaves and crunchy sesame seeds.
10. Serve with additional cheonggukjang for dipping.
